scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix frontend run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const paths=['frontend/dist','frontend/.vercel/output/static','.vercel/output/static']; for(const p of paths){ if(fs.existsSync(p)){ fs.cpSync(p,'dist',{recursive:true}); console.log('Copied build output from '+p+' to dist'); break; } }"
